hero.title: Donate with
hero.subtitle: A calmer, complete donation journey with secure checkout, instant acknowledgement, and deeper trust.

handoff.message: You opened donation checkout from the mobile app.

overview.title: A donation experience built with trust, clarity, and gratitude
overview.subtitle: Choose a cause, complete your donor details once, and offer seva through secure Razorpay checkout without leaving the experience.

form.title: Complete your offering
form.subtitle: Fill your details once, choose one-time or monthly seva, and receive your acknowledgement instantly.
form.messagePlaceholder: Add a short message if you wish
form.taxBenefitOptIn: I would like an 80G-ready receipt for this donation

validation.checkoutUnavailable: Secure checkout could not be loaded right now. Please refresh the page.

states.loadError: Unable to load donation data right now.
states.checkoutError: We could not start the payment flow. Please try again.
states.verifyError: Payment was initiated but confirmation could not be verified. Please contact the Ashram office if money was debited.

success.title: Donation received with gratitude
success.subtitle: Your offering has been recorded. Receipt details will reach you by email and WhatsApp.
success.shareText: I just offered {{amount}} towards {{campaign}} through AvdheshanandG Mission.

trust.secureSubtitle: Your payment happens through a secure Razorpay checkout with verified backend order creation.
trust.receiptSubtitle: Eligible donations receive an acknowledgement and 80G-ready receipt immediately after capture.
